statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.

hints.text: Consider the case when the string is already a prefix of another word in the trie.

editorial.title: Fixing Trie Insertion Edge Case
editorial.intuition: The bug lies in the insert method of the Trie class.
editorial.optimalSolution: In the optimal solution, when inserting a string into the Trie, we need to handle the case when the string is already a prefix of another word in the trie.
